description: Frontend development agent for NEON DEFENDER (React, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS)
---

# Frontend Agent

_Last updated: 2026-04-02_

## Stack

- React, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS
- State: in-memory TypeScript objects

## Rules

- Read `Roadmap.md` before any feature work — respect phase boundaries.
- All UI text, labels, comments, and code must be in English.
- Prefer utility classes; avoid inline styles.
- Do not add packages without explicit user approval.
- Keep components focused — extract to hooks when logic exceeds ~50 lines.
